park_name: Werri Beach Holiday Park Gerringong [Kiama Coast Holiday Park]

reviews.review_text: We had a great time at this park. Our dog friendly cabin was perfectly positioned on the beach frontage. Everything is close by. Would recommend this place for sure.

What a great little retreat from the busy world.  Stayed in a dog 🐕 friendly cabin, that is truly dog friendly with a fenced yard.  We had everything we needed, including the sound of the ocean when retreating to bed.  So good to be able to travel with our dogs.  Lovely and helpful staff.  See you again soon.

Great trip away with a couple of mates down to Gerringong, highly recommend Werri Beach Holiday Park, perfect location just across the road from an incredible beach, good facilities and the staff were very kind and helpful ! 10/10!!

Enjoyed our recent stay at Werri Beach Holiday Park on a dog friendly powered tent site. Good sized grassed sites perfect for our large Oz tent, car and trailer. Nice kitchen, clean and tidy facilities, friendly staff. Short walk to the beach, shops and cafes. Other accommodation options available too.

As soon as I got there, I could tell it wasn’t the best. My bed had ants in and, and they didn’t give a fitted sheet for my bed. Bedrooms did not have aircon, which was really bad considering there was a heat wave and the room was completely wood, like the walls, roof and floor. Good area and pool wasn’t bad

Great place to stay. Dog shit through the park, but if you can sidestep woofy poo poo it is great.
The management don’t poo in the park,  I get that, but like bears, dogs shit where they stand.
Wear runners, and get ready to side step!
Great place otherwise!
Very quiet and fantastic location. Love it.

Very disappointed
I don’t appreciate being promised something to receive nothing but excuses, pretentious and lies
Having stayed in over 50 caravan parks over the last few years where they have been excellent, I don’t write these words lightly

Great little Caravan Park even though the Cabin and Permanent side is big , Caravan sites are big (up the back) Office Staff are very friendly and helpful,Close to bowling club and town is a solid uphill walk of 1 Klms,  while the beach is across the road the Dog friendly part of beach is a 1 Klms flat walk away,
Great little spot close to the bowls club, beach and walking tracks. |Clean amenities and lovely staff that were happy to chat and offer assistance as needed. We’ll be back
Lovely location and tidy park. Powered site was a great size. Amenities were clean and tidy. Very helpful at reception.

Amazing location.
Spoke to Jackie. What a breath of fresh air.

Thank you for making us feel welcome 🙌

We stayed on a powered caravan site - plenty of space for everyone, including our furry friend. Off leash area for running around. Well maintained amenities. Great location, close to bowls club, beach, coffee shops. Short drive to Kiama if you need more. Lovely, friendly staff and community! Second time here and hope to be back for more.
Great spot to stay. Loved the ocean swimming pools nearby.
Great service and excellent amenities

My family and I were looking for a place to get away for a few days and were not able to get the help we needed, until we contacted Werri Beach holiday park. We spoke to Jackie who really went the extra mile to help us find accommodation for our family and pet dog. We stayed at the cabin called The Beach House. It is literally right across from the beach so that was our view. Couldn’t get any better than that. Everything was very clean and we had everything we needed. Shops were 5 min away and also the Best views ever. Just simply so beautiful. Everyone was also so friendly. Just wanted to thank everyone at the Park for making our holiday very memorable. We will definitely be booking again in the near future and have recommended family and friends to  make bookings as well. Thank you again 🌻

We enjoyed a two-night stay at Werri Beach Holiday Park in the "Sea Spray" beachfront cabin, an option which allowed us to stay with our dog.||Check-in was superb, the most welcoming and genuine experience we've had on recent travels in Australia. The cabin was great - very spacious with a huge deck (with gate) and outdoor kitchen. It was clean and the bathroom looked newly renovated. Our cabin was situated right across the (quiet) street from the beach with a water view. ||The location really couldn't be better, we loved Werri Beach as first-time visitors to the area. The Gerringong shops are so close too and The Perfect Break was awesome for us as vegan travellers!||Unusually for caravan parks, the free wi-fi was strong and reliable throughout our stay.||This was one of the best cabins and locations on a recent NSW South coast road trip and we'd love to come back to this excellent park. Thanks again for being dog-friendly.
De dames bij de receptie waren erg aardig en behulpzaam. Alles ziet er netjes en schoon uit. De locatie is prachtig. 😊☀️
We had a van site very clean, and we will return again
Clean & tidy facilities.

We absolutely loved our stay here. The team went above and beyond – they’re so caring, accommodating, and genuinely lovely to deal with. The location couldn’t be better, and the cabins have everything you need to feel right at home. Such a beautiful experience – we’d highly recommend it to anyone.
Staff, location and sites were good. The unpowered sites were very expensive at $55.
Great spot clean cabins across from the beach great staff we will be back again to stay

Staying a week at this fabulous caravan park. We have a large, flat site which is great.
The amenities are great and very clean and the location of the park is quite central - not far at all from Kiama

Would definitely recommend a stay here and would stay here again if we pass through.

My wife, my dog and I stayed in a dog friendly beach cabin by the road next to the beach. We had such an enjoyable time that we have booked again this year. We sat under cover outside and watched the joggers and dog walkers pass. The beach has nearby off leash dog access and Socks loved it. So did we.  Good clean amenities and a very friendly and helpful staff. I would highly recommend Werri Beach Holiday Park.

Hubby and I have come with our 2 cavoodles for a short getaway|Excellent location, dog friendly and friendly staff|Even the local bowling club is pet friendly which was an added bonus for dinner one night|Lived there was a bbq on verandah |Will definitely be returning in the near future we have found our new getaway place
Cabi  was i  desperate need of a good clean. Sand/dirt all over the floor, some other bodily matter left in the toilet and sink. Not great.

Amazing rooms, very nice-looking. We got one of the sea view cabins, are were pleased to see that there was a private barbecue, outdoor seating, and inside fans, air conditioner, and best of all, a kitchen with all that you will need. Very good value, I would recommend booking out of Kiama like this place to avoid the expensive prices. One downside was the the pool pump was broken, but they apparently fixed it the day after we left.

I stayed in a dog friendly cabin with my rescue dog, first time she has been to the beach..|The cabin was spotless, fully fenced, front lawn, opposite the beach.|Had a fantastic time in this beautiful place and will definitely be back.|Reception and on-site manager were lovely.|I rate this holiday park 5/5|Thankyou.😊

Love this Holiday Park
Spent 2 nights in a dog friendly cabin, it was so clean, fenced with lawn and opposite the beach.
First time have taken my rescue dog away and we had a great time.
5 stars , Thankyou so much
Hoping to return Aug / September.
Reception and on-site manager were lovely.

Had a great time with friends here! 😊
The vibe was perfect, and we all enjoyed every moment. Definitely a place worth visiting!

I picked this caravan park because it’s across the road from the beach and it had great reviews. I ended up staying two weeks and it was one of the best caravan parks I’ve stayed at. The care and attention to detail is evident in the clean amenities and beautifully manicured grounds. Jacqui and her crew went out of their way to check in and recommend local activities. It’s by far the best run and friendly places I’ve stayed at. Highly recommended this spot, but I do recommend booking as word is out, this is a popular spot. I’ll definitely be back.

I picked this caravan park because it’s across the road from the beach and it had great reviews. I ended up staying two weeks and it was one of the best caravan parks I’ve stayed at. The care and attention to detail is evident in the clean amenities and beautifully manicured grounds. Jacqui and her crew went out of their way to check in and recommend local activities. It’s by far the best run and friendly places I’ve stayed at. Highly recommended this spot, but I do recommend booking as word is out, this is a popular spot!
Rather cool, lots of puddling in the rain. :(
Very understanding and customer friendly people
Wonderful staff, very accomodating. Amenities spotless. Close to beach, bowling club and town. Well worth staying at.

We stayed on a long grass site. It is a great location being so close to the beach and the Bowling Club. The scenery is amazing at Werri Beach. Rolling green hills meet the ocean. The park does not have security boom gates, but the grounds and amenities were clean.
The front desk staff fab,the park is not to bad

Great location right near the beach, the cabins are fantastic and have everything you need. The staff went out of their way to ensure we had fabulous weekend which was very much appreciated. We are definitely booking again !!!
Great location and amazing staff. Will be back

Great park friendly host and staff. Lovely and clean. Very helpful information provided to tourists.
Would stay again

We had an absolute ball here with our family and dog. There is a fenced off grass area which we found very convenient for tiring out our dog in the morning and before bed. The staff are great, amenities were clean and the park had everything we needed. The location is great!
Great location, rooms and staff were faultless
Staff very hard working to get the cabins clean and ready. Great location right across from beach.

I sent the Park Management an email at the end of December. I wanted a positive reply and have received ZIP. So I'm putting it onto Tripadvisor. Here's some of the email.|We stayed in our cabin - Sunset 1 from 9th to 16th December. Unfortunately the feedback is not good. The only positive is the area. We love it and want to stay in Gerringong again, but not in that cabin or perhaps not in any cabin at your park. Here's the issues.|*prior to arrival, I asked for the second bedroom bed to be made up. It wasn't. Admittedly when I rang reception you kindly came over and made the bed.| *the outdoor table and chairs was covered with dust. My clothes got dirty when I sat there.| *the cabin floors where filthy. Every time we got into the shower the floor of the bath were dirty/black.| *we wanted to cook some roast vegetables and chicken thighs. Normally this would take 30-40 minutes in a proper oven. It took 90 minutes for this meal to cook and the veggies were not browned at all.|  *there were no decent sharp knives nor a cutting board.|  *the wifi was non existent. We couldn't get any access to view emails let alone watch a movie, which was doable elsewhere in the park.|  *when we emptied a filled bathroom sink water went all over the floor causing a slip hazard. This didn't happen if the water was just flowing.|We paid almost $280 per night for what is really only a three to three and half star quality and for that price none of these issues should have been evident. Back in April we stayed in a 3 bedroom 5 star BnB, with a fully equipped kitchen in Gerringong for $330 per night and compared to $280 for your place, the quality difference was huge. As much a we like the location at Werri Beach, it is highly unlikely we will come back to your park, especially Sunset 1. If we did we would need assurances that the issues mentioned above would not exist and that we would receive a significant goodwill price reduction to reflect the quality the place is (not).

Spacious and clean campground with amazing facilities. Toilet buildings are super clean. We stayed on a powered site for a whole week and we absolutely loved it. Also amazing location as it’s just walking distance to the beach and the nearby rock pool.

Very disappointing family holiday multiple cabins, only good thing was location. We had a spa cabin very expensive so was expecting a lovely stay, but it was not clean, had to purchase cleaning products and clean myself. Dirty bugs over kitchen benches.  Floors sticky and sand on the floor. Spa bath was filthy did not use. The stench from the toilet filled the cabin. My recommendation to Kiama Coast is to stay there yourself and get better cleaners.

This is such a cute, older caravan park. We had a VERY rainy and wet two nights here with friends. BUT we had the best time. Cannot fault the staff who were friendly and informative. Easy online booking/payment portal. Dog friendly. Great location with the beach across the road (not that we got beach weather haha!). Nice big caravan sites. Easy to get in and out. The amenities, whilst older, are clean and maintained well. Our kiddies had a bath both nights in the shower block. Which was awesome! We used the camp kitchen for dinner one night, which was nice to get us all out of the weather and the kids had a big enough space to play in the dry. The kids even had a swim in the pool while it rained!
If you are after a fancy Big 4 park, please don't stay here and then leave a nasty review.
A lovely little family-friendly, dog-friendly gem.
We hope to do another trip and snag some warm, sunny beach weather. Thanks Werri!
The place we stayed was incredible! It was clean and quiet and everyone was so friendly and accommodating.
Highway robbery for $60 pn in a paddock, no views, very old lacklustre amenities, better off at Berry showgrounds

I recently spent a month at Werri Beach Holiday Park and I cannot fault them 1 bit! From the moment I turned up the staff were incredibly helpful and easy to work with. They had a bath in the amenities block..A BATH OMG!!! While I was I was chatting with Jackie about the little things, like a bath, saying as a solo traveller 24/7 a bath is pure gold and hard to find she went out the back and gave me a jar of rose scented bath salts AND the key to use the spa bath in thier luxury cabin. You can bet ya sweet pattotie I took full advantage of the offer and I soaked away for half an hour...bliss!
The caretaker was also amazing  !!! He helped me reverse my caravan in AND let me borrow a TV and antenna cable as the park has access to free to air aswell plus foxtel. As he was setting everything up he said they wanted me to have a good experience while staying there and I did. He also helped me with my awning and hitching up to leave.
The amenities were spotless, the camp kitchen was always clean and well stocked in regards to pots n pans including cutlery n crockery. The bins were never stinky or dirty and the grounds were tidy and well looked after.  There's also a little off leash area near the toilets and my puppy had an absolute ball with other campers dogs aswell.
As I female solo traveller I felt safe and looked after, which is lovely when most places just want your money and do nothing or very little in return.
I will definitely be coming back and I HIGHLY recommend you book your next adventure with these guys too!

Location Location Location. Just across from the beach and the Esplanade walking track. Close to the Gerringong Bowlo and a short drive to Gerringong CBD. The cabins very clean and well stocked with kitchen essentials. A great bbq area on the front verandah. The heating was very efficient. Staff very friendly and accommodating. Used the laundry and it was very clean. We'll be back 😊

No security, driveway straight in from the road, no boom gate, no fence, no lighting. Nothing.
Toilets & showers in a dilapidated, poorly presented & maintained but clean state were up a hill away from the people who would use them the most! Up near the permament van sites!!
Dump point up the hill behind a gate which couldn't be accessed with a vehicle!! You try dragging 20 litres up a hill!
Clean, plentiful facilities. Slow hot watering, waste a lot getting heat. In the very bottom powered sites it was grassy, flat, shady but to access the toilets there was a fence and an open creek between you and the facilities! Poorly laid out park, there needs to be a facilities block in the bottom powered sites area. And the water and power is totally illogical for Aussie made vans which have power and water connections on one side!
Delightful staff, lovely friendly welcome, gorgeous place but typical of government run van parks!!

Right opposite the beach, our spacious, pet friendly cabin was situated right across from a dog friendly, spacious, sandy beach. Our holiday was cut short due to a never ending rain storm. We will define return
A bit too busy for me. I prefer a quieter venue.
Beach just across the road. Nice cabins. Could do with full sized tennis court
Great spot, we will definitely be back.
Arrived without a booking, staff went above and beyond to help us with dog friendly accommodation. Could not fault them.
Great cabins on the beach ⛱️
Large caravan sites on grass, walk to beach, large swimming pool, great facilities, easy to book, easy going and friendly staff, will be back.
Very old school park. Powered site we are on has plenty of room.  Amenities clean and tidy.
Good little Park to stop at on the way  large sites available for larger vans being pulled by large vehicles
Very friendly, clean amenities and close to shops and food

Had a great holiday here. The staff are lovely (there was a minor issue with an appliance in the cabin and it was fixed within 10 minutes of it being reported). Oceanside cabins have everything you need and are a 10 second walk to the beach. Close proximity to the shops and bowling club. Great pool too. We will definately be back.

We have stayed at werri beach a few times and we have always enjoyed our stay. Staff are super friendly, sites are nice and big. Pool is great, nice and close to the beach. Amenities always clean. No issues. 5 star service. We Love that it's dog friendly. Thank you.
Werri Beach is pretty. Caravan park well maintained, 1 block from beach.Sites narrow but long. We need 8m. Bus to Gerringong shops. Dog friendly.
Caravan powered site. Great location, park is clean and well maintained but basic. Nice pool.

Great little caravan Park.
Lots of cabins and permanent holiday cabins.

We enjoyed our stay.
Staff friendly and helpful.
Amenities good.
Camp kitchens good.
Laundry good.

Caravan Sites good.
Close to the beach.
pet friendly.
Shops not to far away.

Arrived 630.name on booking did not match site so we were late arriving. No communication from owners on how to check in. Called their number they did not answer only voice mail.  Went to a reception office with a completely different name. No poster about late arrivals. Post box with no sign took a chance and our key was in it. First impressions of cabin dark uninviting.  Park is full of very low quality permanent hope s. At 220 dollars a night this is a ripp off. Will check out first thing and request refund. Honestly hard earnt money wasted on poor quality accomodation
Large caravan sites. Good amenities.
Great little Park opposite the beach and next door to the bowling club. Clean good sized cabins.

Dave and Jade were super helpful when we pulled up unannounced.  Given a generous camp-site for our van.   Amenities are spotless, as are the campsites.  Beautiful town and surroundings.  Will definitely be back.

I just booked a night for my son who is driving from Cairns to Warragul Victoria.
Spoke to Jackie who was amazing. She went above and beyond to make sure he's overnight stay was as comfortable as possible.
Thank you soooooo much Jackie
Cheers Jo
Great dog freindly park opposite the beach . Amenities could be cleaner, but in fairness the place was packed on a long weekend. Will be back, just not when it's so busy
nice peaceful place to relax
Just camped the night really nice spot. Good camp kitchen and clean facility's 👌
